title: WTHIT: Small Ships Plugin
description: A simple WTHIT/WAILA plugin to display Small Ships ship properties.
body: A simple WTHIT/WAILA plugin to display [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) ship properties. ![Screenshot of the Small Ships WTHIT plugin in icon mode.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zPDxO1Zp/images/ed0b977af84e72199b3df631b88924bc68b951a3.png) ## Features Displays custom ship name, max speed, cargo capacity and ship health/damage in the tooltip for Small Ships vessels. Display stats as text, icons, or both. ## Acknowlegements Icon: spyglass by Eucalyp from Noun Project (CC BY 3.0)
